notes: Packaged calibration refreshed after the 2026-05-05 universe pruning/tuning pass. Active production set is BTC/SOL/BNB/SEI/ZEC; ETH/PEPE/TAO/BCH/LINK are symbol-blocked until recalibration restores edge. BNB and ZEC keep only their profitable recent lanes.
